name: drawtrieq
creator: ews31415
description: Draws an equilateral (60-60-60) triangle. Enter the length of the side (s). The base is set on the x-axis. The screen is set up to fit the proportion of the 320 x 220 screen. The vertical axis ranges from y = -44 to y = 44 while the horizontal axis ranges from x = -64 to x = 64.
